hero.headline:
Two Generations of Salon
Excellence
hero.subheadline: Your hair deserves more than ordinary. At Peles Salon & Spa, our Aveda-trained stylists and PCA Certified estheticians deliver personalized hair, skin, and spa services that leave you looking and feeling extraordinary. Over 40 years of artistry, now yours to experience.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Hair, Skin & Spa Services<br class="hidden md:block"> Tailored to You
services.subtitle: From precision cuts and vibrant color to rejuvenating facials and flawless nails, every service is customized to enhance your natural beauty. Experience the difference that 40 years of expertise makes.

cards.title: Hair Cuts & Styling
cards.description: Precision cuts, blowouts, and styling by Aveda-trained professionals. Every look is tailored to your hair type, face shape, and personal style.

cards.title: Color & Highlights
cards.description: From subtle balayage to bold transformations using Aveda organic hair color. Vibrant, long-lasting results that keep your hair healthy and radiant.

cards.title: Spa Facials & Skin Care
cards.description: Luxurious facials including our signature Chilled Rose Facial, performed by PCA Certified estheticians using professional-grade PCA Skin products.

cards.title: Extensions & Treatments
cards.description: Premium hair extensions, keratin smoothing treatments, and Aveda Botanical Repair therapy to restore, strengthen, and transform your hair.

cards.title: Nail Services
cards.description: Full-service manicures and pedicures with premium products and meticulous attention to detail in a relaxing, spa-like environment.

cards.title: Lashes, Waxing & Makeup
cards.description: Professional lash extensions, precision waxing, and expert makeup application for everyday confidence or your most special occasions.

how_it_works.headline: Your Peles Experience in Three Steps

steps.title: Book Your Visit
steps.description: Call us or book online. We'll match you with the right stylist or esthetician for your needs and schedule a time that works for you.

steps.title: Personalized Consultation
steps.description: Every appointment begins with a one-on-one consultation. We listen to your goals, assess your hair or skin, and create a customized plan just for you.

steps.title: Leave Looking Extraordinary
steps.description: Sit back, relax, and let our team work their magic. You'll walk out feeling confident, refreshed, and ready to turn heads. Guaranteed.

about.label: Why Clients Trust Peles
about.headline: Not Just a Salon — A 40-Year Legacy of Beauty
about.description: Family-owned and spanning two generations, Peles Salon & Spa has been the trusted name in Greensburg since 1984. Recognized by Intercoiffure as one of the top 1% of salons nationally and ranked a Top Global Salon by HairShow Magazine, our team of Aveda-trained stylists and PCA Certified estheticians bring world-class artistry to every appointment.

features.title: Top 1% Nationally Ranked
features.description: Proud member of Intercoiffure and recognized as a Top Global Salon by HairShow Magazine — quality you can trust.

features.title: Aveda & PCA Certified Team
features.description: Our stylists are Aveda-trained and our estheticians are PCA Certified, ensuring the highest standard of care for your hair and skin.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Every team member completes our exclusive training program. If you're not thrilled with your results, we'll make it right.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every service includes a personalized consultation. No hidden fees, no surprises — just beautiful results.

guarantee.headline: Our "Beautiful Results" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely thrilled with your service, let us know within 7 days and we'll restyle, recolor, or redo your treatment at no additional charge. With 40 years of reputation on the line, we stand behind every single appointment.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can call us at 724-834-4400 or reach out via email. We'll match you with the perfect stylist or esthetician based on your needs and schedule a convenient time.

faqs.question: What products do you use?
faqs.answer: We exclusively use Aveda botanical products and organic hair color for hair services, and professional-grade PCA Skin products for our facial and skin care treatments. These premium products deliver superior results while being gentle on your hair and skin.

faqs.question: Do I need a consultation before my first visit?
faqs.answer: Every appointment includes a complimentary consultation. Your stylist or esthetician will discuss your goals, assess your hair or skin, and recommend the best approach — all before any service begins.

faqs.question: What makes Peles different from other salons?
faqs.answer: We're one of only a handful of Intercoiffure member salons in the country, placing us in the top 1% nationally. Our team completes an exclusive training program, and we've been recognized as a Top Global Salon by HairShow Magazine. That level of expertise is rare.

faqs.question: Do you offer services for special events?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. From bridal parties to proms, our team provides expert hair styling, makeup application, and lash services for your most important occasions. We recommend booking special event appointments well in advance.

testimonials.name: Shelby
testimonials.text: I love Peles! Everyone is so friendly and I feel so welcome there. Stacie does an amazing job every time. The atmosphere is wonderful and my hair always looks incredible.

testimonials.name: Jessica
testimonials.text: Jenny is amazing! My grandparents have been going to her for years. The quality of service and attention to detail is unmatched. Peles truly is a family tradition for us.

testimonials.name: Renny
testimonials.text: Expert stylists, botanical products, great vibe. Always accommodating guests. This is the only salon I trust with my hair — the experience is consistently outstanding.

contact.headline:
Ready to Experience
Peles Salon & Spa?
contact.subtitle: Book your appointment today. Walk in feeling hopeful, walk out feeling extraordinary — that's the Peles promise.

footer.description: Family-owned salon & spa. Serving Greensburg and Western PA since 1984.
